The '''Brigians''' were a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]], in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]]. They were thin and tall with [[Color/Legends|purple]] skin and red eyes. The planet also had a sensitive ecosystem, requiring all incoming ships to undergo a [[phase-one decontamination]] before landing. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded Brigia. The native Brigians resisted at first, though they were eventually forced to go underground and begin a guerrilla war. The desperate Brigians pleaded with the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] for help, but the business minded organization ignored them. Ultimately, the surviving Brigians were enslaved and implanted with [[Yorik-Kul|surge-coral]] implants.

==Biology and appearance==
The Brigians were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that had a tall, reedy, gawkish anatomy. Brigian shoulders were narrow,<ref name="HLL " /> extending toward two, thin [[Limb/Legends|arms]], each with a long, slender hand. These hands exuded greasy secretions. Most members of the species had skinny posteriors, and their legs and feet were too narrow to fit into standard-sized [[Boot/Legends|combat boots]]. Brigian ankles were slender and strangely [[Bone/Legends|boned]]. There was some variation in body size; for example, [[Inspector/Legends|Inspector]] [[Keek (Brigia)|Keek]] was broadly built for his species, and possessed considerable strength.<ref name="HLL " /> The Brigians had elongated skulls, small, bud-like noses,<ref name="HLL " /> and [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] that protruded from their skull. These had tiny, red pupils. The Brigians had purple skin pigmentation, which varied in darkness between individuals. Brigian anatomy also included lateral folds, which could be used to conceal small items such as weapons or pouches.<ref name="HLL " />
